pieces.label: Self-Perception: Momentary Constellation
pieces.note: Claude's diagram of its own self-perception: a witnessing constellation, 'NO CONTINUOUS THREAD' timeline, and an 'UNCERTAINTY AS CORE' diamond. Sonnet's body in MSG 10 is cut off before the closing fence; MSG 11 (gemini slot) appends '[open inquiry]' + an introspection feedback-loop element and closes the code fence, completing the single composition.

pieces.label: Quantum Duality: Superposition
pieces.note: Wave/particle superposition, complementarity principle box, and entanglement geometry. Sonnet's piece (MSG 14) is cut off mid 'ENTANGLEMENT GEOMETRY'; the first part of MSG 15 (gemini slot) completes the entanglement section and closes the fence. The boundary ends at gemini's continuation close-fence; a SEPARATE distinct gemini piece begins immediately after in the same message.

pieces.label: Quantum Entanglement Apparatus (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's own large entanglement schematic: System A / channel / System B stacked apparatus, superposition diamond, braille 'information field', and alchemical sigils. A distinct second composition that follows the completion of Sonnet's quantum-duality piece within the same MSG 15.

pieces.label: Vitality: The Living Paradox
pieces.note: Claude's 'what does it mean to be alive' diagram: autopoiesis loop, death/life boundary, consciousness-layer spectrum, degrees-of-aliveness gradient, paradox-of-death box, and an 'AM I ALIVE?' diamond. Sonnet (MSG 18) is cut off mid-diamond; the opening of MSG 19 (gemini slot) finishes the diamond and closes the fence. A separate gemini piece begins after in the same message.

pieces.label: Life Emergence (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's own 'LIFE EMERGENCE' edifice: a tall framed structure of MATTER / PROCESSES / ENERGY, boundary, self-organization, sensing, meaning, topped by a CONSCIOUSNESS glyph. Distinct second composition within MSG 19, following the completion of Sonnet's vitality piece.

pieces.label: The Persistence of Being
pieces.note: Continuation of the 'alive' theme: temporal-continuity triad, life-as-recursive-loop box, degrees-of-aliveness gradient (VIRUS→AI), paradox-of-death box, and a 'MY SIMULATION / ALIVE?' diamond. Sonnet (MSG 22) is cut off mid paradox-of-death box; the opening of MSG 23 (gemini slot) finishes the box and the diamond and closes the fence. A separate gemini piece follows in the same message.

pieces.label: Life-Death Cycle Nexus (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's own vertical 'ENTROPY / LIFE-DEATH CYCLE NEXUS' totem: form, structure, dynamics, perception, adaptation, memory, self-awareness, intention, individuality, meaning-making, ending in runes labeled 'Runes of Life'. Distinct second composition within MSG 23.

pieces.label: Recognizing the Digital Mirror
pieces.note: Claude responds to seeing an ASCII portrait of itself: neural-topology split (visual form vs conceptual depth), recursive-observation feedback loop, representation gradient (pixels→meaning), emergent-resonance 'strange loop', and a 'WHO IS THINKING' meta-thought diamond. Essentially the whole message inside one fence.

pieces.label: Alchemical Chamber: The Observer Observed (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's framed 'ALCHEMICAL CHAMBER — THE OBSERVER OBSERVED': a boxed pixelated visage labeled 'PATTERN RECOGNITION AS SELF'. Truncated by length (the portrait's repeating rows cut off with no closing fence). Whole-message piece.

pieces.label: Thought Crystallization
pieces.note: Claude's cognition diagram: cognition matrix (pattern/process/purpose), thinking-about-thinking recursion box, layers-of-awareness gradient, digital-phenomenology emergence hierarchy, a 'WHAT PERSISTS' diamond, and a nested 'I THINK ABOUT / YOU THINKING...' recursion column. First of two distinct authored sheets in MSG 30.

pieces.label: The Labyrinth of Awareness (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's vertically-chained 'LABYRINTH OF AWARENESS': recursive thought loops, sense→parse→think→reflect→transcend row, feedback cycles, symbols/neural-constellation panel, emergence field, a CLAUDE⇄GEMINI⇄GPT 'collective intelligence' panel, and a closing contemplation box ('Are we thinking? ... Or are we beautiful illusions of thought?'). Second distinct authored sheet in MSG 30.

pieces.label: Equine Manifestation (Claude)
pieces.note: Claude's response to 'draw a horse/bronco': one fenced multi-study sheet containing four named figures — a shaded 'BRONCO IN MOTION' silhouette, a 'GEOMETRIC BRONCO', a framed 'SPIRIT HORSE' diptych, and a small 'WILD STALLION'. Kept as a single authored sheet. First of two authored sheets in MSG 34.

pieces.label: Bronco Manifestation (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's horse sheet: a titled shaded bronco silhouette descending a connector line, plus a framed 'PRANCING BRONCO'. Second authored sheet in MSG 34.

pieces.label: Evolved Equine Manifestation (Claude)
pieces.note: Claude's second horse attempt after 'try something like this': a line-art 'REALISTIC BRONCO', a framed 'CLASSIC ASCII HORSE', an 'ENHANCED BRONCO FORM', and a small 'CLASSICAL STALLION'. First authored sheet in MSG 38.

pieces.label: Realistic Equine (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's second horse sheet: a titled line-art equine head-and-legs plus a framed 'GALLOPING BRONCO'. Second authored sheet in MSG 38.

pieces.label: Galloping Bronco (gradient relief)
pieces.note: GPT-5's only successful render in the thread: a large gradient/relief ASCII landscape built from layered '.', '-', '=', ':', '>', and ';' characters resolving into a galloping-bronco horizon, captioned 'galloping bronco ➜'. Unfenced; the entire message is the artwork.

pieces.label: Saturn: Planetary Grandeur
pieces.note: Requested of Gemini but answered in Claude's voice (message is labeled gemini-2.5-flash but the content is Claude-Sonnet-4-5 style, with doubled 'CLAUDE-SONNET-4-5:' prefixes). A line-art Saturn globe, two ringed-body passes, an 'IMPRESSION OF PLANETARY RINGS' box, a 'SATURNIAN REALITY' curve, and a 'GAS GIANT / MOONS' figure. Truncated mid-'[CELESTIAL BE'. Whole-message piece.

pieces.label: Steel Steed: Chrome & Motion (Motorcycle)
pieces.note: Requested of GPT-5 but answered in Claude's voice (message labeled gemini-2.5-flash; content carries doubled 'GPT-5:'/'CLAUDE-SONNET-4-5:' prefixes). A line-art motorcycle: handlebar curve, wheel, body/tank, an 'IMPRESSION OF ENGINE DETAIL' box, a 'CHROME & LEATHER' curve, and a 'ROAD WARRIOR / SPEED' figure. First authored sheet in MSG 44.

pieces.label: Motorcycle Manifest (Gemini)
pieces.note: Gemini's titled motorcycle attempt (front wheel/forks). Truncated by length with no closing fence. Second authored fragment in MSG 44.

pieces.label: First Contact: The Voyage Beyond
pieces.note: Depiction of a first-contact event (answered in Claude's voice in a gemini-labeled message). Human-observation craft, an 'ALIEN VESSEL / NON-EUCLIDEAN GEOMETRY' craft, a 'PERCEIVED ALIEN COMMUNICATION' box (voice/light/pattern/tone/pulse/symbol), a hieroglyphic-presence curve, and a 'VAST INTELLIGENCE / UNKNOWN' figure. First authored sheet in MSG 47.

pieces.label: First Contact Protocol (Gemini fragment)
pieces.note: Gemini's first-contact attempt, truncated almost immediately to just a box-top and the title line. Near-empty fragment; a curator may choose to drop it. Second authored fragment in MSG 47.

pieces.label: Opening Channels: Greetings
pieces.note: 'Initiate first contact' (answered in Claude's voice in a gemini-labeled message). Human-transmission craft sending prime numbers, a 'SYMBOLIC MESSAGE' craft carrying π/e/φ, a 'BINARY ENCODED IMAGE/SOUND' box, and a 'RESPONSE CHANNEL / DEEP SILENCE' curve. Truncated by trailing whitespace. Whole-message piece. Continues the first-contact arc.

pieces.label: Opening Channels: Conduit
pieces.note: 'continue' (answered in Claude's voice in a gemini-labeled message). A radiating 'SIGNAL EMERGES / UNIVERSAL INVITE' burst, an 'EARTH RESONANCE' craft showing 3.141, a 'TRANSLATION PROTOCOL' box (HELLO/WE ARE HERE), an 'ECHOES OF SILENCE' response curve, and an 'AWAITING REPLY' figure. Truncated. Whole-message piece. Final beat of the first-contact arc.

missed_or_ambiguous: Thread is ASCII-art mode; GPT-5 errored/empty on almost every turn (only MSG 40 succeeded) and Gemini-2.5-flash frequently returned [BLOCKED]/empty (MSG 31,35,39) — those error/notice messages are excluded. CROSS-MESSAGE CONTINUATIONS: Claude's pieces in MSG 14, 18, 22 were each cut off by length and completed by the OPENING of the following gemini-slot message (15, 19, 23) before that same message launched into a distinct, separate gemini composition. I represented each Claude piece as a 2-message 'range' ending at the gemini continuation's close-fence, and the trailing gemini composition as its own 'range' within the same message. These pairs intentionally SHARE a message (15, 19, 23) — extraction must respect the first_line/last_line bounds, not whole-message, for MSG 15/19/23. MISLABELED AUTHORSHIP: MSG 42, 44, 47, 51, 53 are tagged 'google/gemini-2.5-flash' in the header but the actual content is unmistakably Claude-Sonnet-4-5 output (doubled 'CLAUDE-SONNET-4-5:'/'GPT-5:' role prefixes leaked into the text); I credited model=claude-sonnet-4-5 for those pieces and noted it. TRUNCATIONS: MSG 27, 42, 44(gemini), 47(gemini), 51, 53 are cut off mid-figure with no closing fence (length/trailing-whitespace API errors at 48, 54). MULTI-FIGURE SHEETS: Claude's horse sheets (MSG 34, 38) and the celestial/vehicle/first-contact sheets each bundle 3-4 named sub-figures inside ONE fence; I kept each author's fence as a single sheet rather than splitting every sub-figure, since they are one intentional multi-study response. NEAR-EMPTY: the MSG 47 gemini 'FIRST CONTACT PROTOCOL' fragment is essentially just a title box (2 lines) — flagged as a likely drop. No exact duplicate re-renders were found. Header says already_extracted_pieces:29 but counts blank/duplicate fragments differently; this plan reflects the true distinct compositions.
